description: Outcome classification fixtures (Level 3 - Verified). Tests HTTP status codes and response patterns.

fixtures.name: outcome_http_200_success
fixtures.description: HTTP 200 response is classified as success

fixtures.name: outcome_http_201_success
fixtures.description: HTTP 201 Created is classified as success

fixtures.name: outcome_http_202_accepted_unknown
fixtures.description: HTTP 202 Accepted with no final status is classified as unknown

fixtures.name: outcome_http_204_success
fixtures.description: HTTP 204 No Content is classified as success

fixtures.name: outcome_http_400_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 400 Bad Request is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_401_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 401 Unauthorized is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_403_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 403 Forbidden is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_404_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 404 Not Found is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_409_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 409 Conflict is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_429_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 429 Too Many Requests is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_500_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_502_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 502 Bad Gateway is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_503_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 503 Service Unavailable is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_http_504_failure
fixtures.description: HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout is classified as failure

fixtures.name: outcome_timeout_no_response
fixtures.description: Connection timeout (no response) is classified as timeout

fixtures.name: outcome_connection_reset
fixtures.description: Connection reset after request sent is classified as unknown

fixtures.name: outcome_null_response
fixtures.description: Null/undefined response is classified as unknown

fixtures.name: outcome_200_with_error_body_success_wins
fixtures.description: HTTP 200 with error body in response: HTTP status wins (success)

fixtures.name: outcome_partial_success_indicator
fixtures.description: Response with partial success indicator is classified as partial

fixtures.name: outcome_response_with_no_body
fixtures.description: Success response with no body is classified as success

fixtures.name: outcome_response_with_empty_object
fixtures.description: Success response with empty object body is classified as success

fixtures.name: outcome_ambiguous_response
fixtures.description: Ambiguous response that cannot be confidently classified is unknown
